item.title: 苹果家庭硬件负责人离职，加入智能戒指公司 Oura
item.guid: 苹果家庭硬件负责人离职，加入智能戒指公司-Oura
item.description:
According to Bloomberg, Brian Lynch, Apple's Senior Director of Home Device Hardware Engineering, has officially left to join smart ring company Oura Health as Senior Vice President of Hardware Engineering. 据彭博社报道，苹果负责家庭设备硬件工程的高级总监 Brian Lynch 已正式离职，加入智能戒指公司 Oura Health，出任硬件工程高级副总裁一职。

Lynch has led hardware efforts for Apple's home devices division since 2022, and previously held a key engineering management position for Apple's self-driving car project (terminated in 2024). Earlier, he was involved in the development of multiple iPod products. Lynch 自 2022 年起主导苹果家庭设备部门的硬件工作，此前还曾担任苹果自动驾驶汽车项目（2024 年终止）的核心工程管理职位。更早期，他曾参与多款 iPod 产品的研发。

It is reported that Apple's smart home business is in a critical product development phase: a smart display with AI and facial recognition, a desktop robot device with a 9-inch screen, and a home security and automation sensor are all under development, and Lynch is the primary person in charge of the hardware side of these products. 据悉，苹果的智能家居业务正处于关键产品推进阶段：一款搭载 AI 与人脸识别功能的智能显示屏、一台配备 9 英寸屏幕的桌面机器人设备，以及一款家庭安防与自动化传感器均在研发之中，Lynch 正是这些产品硬件端的主要负责人。

It is worth noting that the report also mentioned that Apple is planning multiple AI wearable device product lines, including smart glasses, next-generation AirPods, and an AI pendant that can be hung on a shirt or necklace . All three devices will be equipped with computer vision cameras to provide environmental data to Siri. 值得注意的是，报道还提到苹果正在布局多条 AI 可穿戴设备产品线，包括智能眼镜、新一代 AirPods，以及一款可挂在衬衫或项链的 AI 挂坠 ，三款设备均将搭载计算机视觉摄像头，以向 Siri 提供环境数据。

Among them, the smart display has been repeatedly delayed due to the large-scale restructuring of Siri's work not being completed on time, and is currently expected to be released as early as September this year; the desktop robot and sensor are planned for next year. 其中，智能显示屏因 Siri 大规模重构工作迟迟未能完成而多次推迟，目前最早预计于今年 9 月发布；桌面机器人和传感器则计划于明年推出。

This is the second major personnel change for Apple's home hardware team in recent years. DJ Novotney, Vice President of Program Management, left at the beginning of 2024. The team is currently led by Matt Costello, who also oversees audio engineering and the Beats product line, reporting to John Ternus, Senior Vice President of Hardware Engineering. 这也是苹果家庭硬件团队近年来第二次出现重大人事变动。项目管理副总裁 DJ Novotney 已于 2024 年初离职。目前该团队由 Matt Costello 统领，他同时负责音频工程及 Beats 产品线，向硬件工程高级副总裁 John Ternus 汇报。

Oura has continuously recruited talent from Apple in recent years. After completing fundraising last year, the company was valued at $11 billion. It had previously poached Chief Medical Officer Ricky Bloomfield from Apple's health team, and its Design Director, Miklu Silvanto, also has a background working in Apple's design department. Oura 近年来持续从苹果引进人才。这家公司去年完成融资后估值达 110 亿美元，此前已从苹果健康团队挖来首席医疗官 Ricky Bloomfield，其设计总监 Miklu Silvanto 同样有苹果设计部门的从业背景。

In recent months, Alan Dye, head of user interface, and Lisa Jackson, head of environment and government affairs, have successively left. Former AI head John Giannandrea and general counsel will also step down later this year. 过去数月，用户界面负责人 Alan Dye、环境与政府事务负责人 Lisa Jackson 相继离职，前 AI 负责人 John Giannandrea 及总法律顾问也将于今年晚些时候离任。

item.title: 9999 元起，OPPO Find N6 正式发布
item.guid: 9999-元起，OPPO-Find-N6-正式发布
item.description:
Yesterday, OPPO officially released the Find N6 foldable phone. First, let's look at the prices: 12GB + 256GB: 9999 yuan; 16GB + 512GB: 10999 yuan; 16GB + 1TB Satellite Edition: 11999 yuan. 昨天，OPPO 正式发布 Find N6 折叠屏手机，先看价格：12GB + 256GB：9999 元；16GB + 512GB：10999 元；16GB + 1TB 卫星版：11999 元。

    Equipped with Qualcomm Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen5 (7-core version) + LPDDR5X RAM + UFS 4.1 flash storage;

    Outer screen 6.62 inches 2616×1140 120Hz LTPO OLED, peak 3600nit;

    Inner screen 8.12 inches 2480×2248 120Hz LTPO OLED, peak 2500nit, supports OPPO AI Stylus;

    Main camera 200MP 1/1.56” HP5 23mm f/1.8 OIS, telephoto 50MP 1/2.75” JN5 70mm f/2.7 OIS, ultra-wide 50MP 1/2.75” JN5 15mm f/2.0, inner and outer front cameras 20MP f/2.4 21mm, Danxia color reproduction lens;

    Built-in 6000mAh battery, supports 80W wired + 50W wireless charging;

    Titanium alloy Sky Dome hinge + composite fiberglass back cover + titanium alloy frame, unfolded 4.21mm, folded 8.93mm, weight 225g.

The OPPO Find N6 is available in three colors: Golden Orange, Original Titanium, and Deep Black, and will go on sale on March 20. OPPO Find N6 提供金橙、原钛、深黑三个配色，将于 3 月 20 日开售。

🔗 Related reading: The first "crease-free" phone, for all those who "dare not fold" | OPPO Find N6 Review 🔗 相关阅读： 第一台「无折痕」手机，为所有「不敢折」的人而来｜OPPO Find N6 评测

item.title: 等四年终于用上，国行 Apple Watch 房颤历史正式上线
item.guid: 等四年终于用上，国行-Apple-Watch-房颤历史正式上线
item.description:
Yesterday, Apple officially announced the launch of the mobile pulse rate atrial fibrillation indication recording software feature for Apple Watch in mainland China. 昨天，苹果官宣中国大陆的 Apple Watch 正式推出移动脉率房颤迹象记录软件功能。

🔗 Related reading: Interview with an Apple medical expert: Why should atrial fibrillation patients wear an Apple Watch? 🔗 相关阅读： 专访苹果医学家：房颤患者，为什么应该戴一块 Apple Watch？

Users diagnosed with atrial fibrillation (AFib) can enable the AFib History feature. Users can view important information such as the estimated frequency of heart rate showing AFib signs, receive weekly notifications to understand the estimated frequency of AFib episodes, and view detailed history through the Health app, including lifestyle factors that may affect AFib, such as sleep, alcohol consumption, and exercise. 被诊断患有心房颤动（房颤）的用户，可以打开房颤历史功能。用户可以查看心率显示房颤迹象的估算频率等重要信息，每周获得通知，了解预估房颤发作频率，通过健康 app 查看详细历史记录，包括可能影响房颤的生活方式因素，如睡眠、酒精摄入、运动等。

Users can also download a PDF document containing detailed AFib history and lifestyle factors, which can be easily shared with healthcare professionals for more in-depth and effective communication. 用户还可以下载包含详细房颤历史记录和生活方式因素的 PDF 文档，轻松共享给医护人员，以进行更深入有效的交流。

This feature is available for Apple Watch Series 6 and later, Apple Watch Ultra and later, and Apple Watch SE 2. It was officially announced at WWDC on June 7, 2022, along with watchOS 9, and has been four years since its launch. 这个功能适用于 Apple Watch Series 6 及后续表款、Apple Watch Ultra 及后续表款和 Apple Watch SE 2，在 2022 年 6 月 7 日的 WWDC 上，随 watchOS 9 系统正式宣布推出，至今已四年。

item.title: 曝 iPhone 19e 在 2028 年迎来高刷屏
item.guid: 曝-iPhone-19e-在-2028-年迎来高刷屏
item.description:
According to Korean media ZDNet, Apple plans to introduce a 120Hz LTPO OLED display for the first time in its lower-priced series with the iPhone 19e, scheduled for release in the spring of 2028. 据韩国媒体 ZDNet 报道，苹果计划在 2028 年春季推出的 iPhone 19e 上，首次为其低价系列产品引入 120Hz LTPO OLED 显示屏。

Following Apple's consistent strategy for its 'e' series products, the new device is likely to use a 'downgraded' panel from flagship models to control costs. 按照苹果在 e 系列产品上的一贯策略，新机很可能沿用旗舰机型的「降级」面板以控制成本。

The report states that the iPhone 19e is expected to feature a 6.3-inch LTPO OLED panel with the same specifications as the iPhone 17, offering a resolution of 2622 × 1206, a dynamically adjustable refresh rate between 1Hz and 120Hz, a full-screen brightness of 1600 nits, and a peak HDR brightness of 3000 nits. 报道称，iPhone 19e 预计将采用与 iPhone 17 相同规格的 6.3 英寸 LTPO OLED 面板，分辨率为 2622 × 1206，刷新率可在 1Hz 至 120Hz 之间动态调节，全屏亮度达 1600 尼特，峰值 HDR 亮度为 3000 尼特。

On its higher-end product lines, Apple is reportedly developing LTPO+ technology, planned for its 2028 flagship models. LTPO+ offers improvements over existing LTPO solutions in both power consumption and brightness. 在更高端的产品线上，苹果据悉正在研发 LTPO+ 技术，计划用于 2028 年的旗舰机型。LTPO+ 在功耗与亮度方面均优于现有的 LTPO 方案。

item.title: 雷军谈很早停售第一代 SU7：牺牲销量也不愿背刺老车主
item.guid: 雷军谈很早停售第一代-SU7：牺牲销量也不愿背刺老车主
item.description:
Yesterday, Lei Jun released 'Answers to Netizens' Questions (Episode 2),' responding to public concerns regarding Xiaomi Auto. 昨天，雷军发布《答网友问（第二集）》，就外界关注的小米汽车相关问题作出回应。

In the video, regarding the early discontinuation of the first-generation SU7, Lei Jun admitted that this move 'indeed affected our sales in the first three months,' but he stated that 'not wanting to betray old users' was the core reason for the decision. 视频中，针对第一代 SU7 较早停售一事，雷军坦言此举「确实对我们前三个月的销售产生了影响」，但他表示「不想背刺老用户」，这是做出该决定的核心原因。

Reflecting on the development of Xiaomi Auto over the past two years, Lei Jun described it as 'full of ups and downs, a mix of fire and ice,' stating that 'the achievements made far exceeded expectations, but we also received a lot of criticism and doubts, some of which were very pertinent, but there were also many misunderstandings.' 回顾过去两年小米汽车的发展历程，雷军用「跌宕起伏、冰火两重天」来形容，称「所取得的成绩远超想象，但我们也收到很多批评和质疑，有些批评也是非常中肯的，但也有很多误解」。

He also stated that as a latecomer, Xiaomi Auto 'still has a long way to go,' and 'car manufacturing is a marathon.' 他还表示，作为后来者，小米汽车「还有很长的路要走」，「造车是一场马拉松」。

item.title: 荣耀手机偷偷涨价，起步价最高上调 500 元
item.guid: 荣耀手机偷偷涨价，起步价最高上调-500-元
item.description:
Yesterday, Honor quietly completed price adjustments for several of its models. 昨天，荣耀悄然对旗下多款机型完成了价格调整。

It is reported that a total of four models were involved in this price adjustment: the Honor WIN RT, Honor 500 Standard Edition, and Honor X70 all saw their starting prices increase by 300 yuan, adjusting to 2999 yuan, 2999 yuan, and 1699 yuan respectively; 据悉，此次涉及调价的机型共四款：荣耀 WIN RT、荣耀 500 标准版、荣耀 X70 起步价均上调 300 元，分别调整至 2999 元、2999 元和 1699 元；

The entry-level model Play 10C saw a more significant increase, with an overall adjustment of 450 to 500 yuan. The 4+128GB starting configuration is now priced at 1099 yuan, while its launch price was only 649 yuan. Currently, some model configurations are still out of stock. 入门机型 Play 10C 涨幅更为明显，整体上调 450 至 500 元，4+128GB 起步配置现价 1099 元，而其发售价仅为 649 元。目前部分机型配置仍处于缺货状态。

At the same time, Honor Mall also launched refreshed versions of the Honor 500 and Honor X70. Honor's online customer service explained that the Honor 500 Refreshed Edition 'is a brand new machine produced based on new cost procurement and new components, used to differentiate product names.' 与此同时，荣耀商城还上架了荣耀 500 和荣耀 X70 的焕新版。荣耀在线客服对此解释称，荣耀 500 焕新版「是基于新的成本采购和新元器件生产的全新机器，用于区分产品名称」。

The Honor X70 Refreshed Edition only upgrades the software version to MagicOS 10.0, with no changes to hardware configuration. 荣耀 X70 焕新版仅将软件版本升级至 MagicOS 10.0，硬件配置不变。

Previously, manufacturers such as OPPO, vivo, and Samsung had successively announced adjustments to the recommended retail prices of some models. 此前，OPPO、vivo、三星等厂商均已相继宣布调整部分机型的建议零售价。

item.title: OpenAI 发布「最强小模型」GPT-5.4 mini 与 nano
item.guid: OpenAI-发布「最强小模型」GPT-5.4-mini-与-nano
item.description:
Today, OpenAI officially released two new models, GPT-5.4 mini and GPT-5.4 nano, which the company calls 'the most capable small models to date.' These two models bring the core capabilities of GPT-5.4 into a lighter architecture, designed for high-throughput, latency-sensitive workloads. 今天，OpenAI 正式发布了 GPT-5.4 mini 与 GPT-5.4 nano 两款新模型，官方称其为「迄今为止能力最强的小型模型」。这两款模型将 GPT-5.4 的核心能力引入更轻量的架构，专为高吞吐量、对延迟敏感的工作负载而设计。

    GPT-5.4 mini shows significant improvements over GPT-5 mini in code writing, reasoning, multimodal understanding, and tool usage, with a more than 2x increase in operating speed. It can quickly parse complex user interface screenshots and complete related operational tasks; in multiple benchmark tests, its performance is already close to that of the larger flagship model GPT-5.4;

    GPT-5.4 nano is the lightest and fastest version in the GPT-5.4 series, positioned for sub-agent scenarios such as classification, data extraction, content sorting, and handling simple auxiliary tasks. On SWE-bench Pro, nano significantly outperforms the previous generation GPT-5 mini.

OpenAI positions the core application scenario for these two models within a 'sub-agent' architecture: large models like GPT-5.4 are responsible for task planning and final determination, while specific sub-tasks are distributed in parallel to GPT-5.4 mini for execution, such as code repository searches, large file reviews, and auxiliary document processing. This model has already been applied in Codex. OpenAI 将这两款模型的核心应用场景定位于「子智能体」架构：由 GPT-5.4 等大模型负责任务规划与最终判定，将具体子任务并行分配给 GPT-5.4 mini 执行，例如代码库搜索、大文件审阅及辅助文档处理。这一模式在 Codex 中已得到实际应用。

Regarding pricing, GPT-5.4 mini's API is priced at $0.75 per 1 million input tokens and $4.50 per 1 million output tokens, with a context window of 400K. In contrast, GPT-5.4 is priced at $2.50 per 1 million input tokens and $15.00 per 1 million output tokens, a significant cost difference. 定价方面，GPT-5.4 mini 的 API 定价为每 100 万输入 token 0.75 美元、每 100 万输出 token 4.50 美元，上下文窗口为 400K。相比之下，GPT-5.4 的定价为每 100 万输入 token 2.50 美元、输出 15.00 美元，成本差距悬殊。

GPT-5.4 nano is only available to API users, with even lower pricing: $0.20 per 1 million input tokens and $1.25 per 1 million output tokens. GPT-5.4 nano 仅面向 API 用户开放，定价更低，每 100 万输入 token 0.20 美元，每 100 万输出 token 1.25 美元。

item.title: 任天堂 Switch 2 升级新增「官方超频」模式
item.guid: 任天堂-Switch-2-升级新增「官方超频」模式
item.description:
Nintendo Switch 2 yesterday pushed out system update version 22.0.0, with the most notable feature being 'Handheld Mode Enhancement'. When enabled, Nintendo Switch will be able to run with the same performance as in docked mode when playing in handheld or tabletop mode. 任天堂 Switch 2 昨日推送了 22.0.0 版本系统更新，其中最值得注意的是「掌上模式增强」功能。开启后，以掌机模式或桌面模式游玩时，任天堂 Switch 将能以与底座模式相同的性能运行。

However, this feature currently only supports software from the previous generation Switch, and does not yet support native Switch 2 software. Nintendo also warns that while this feature can improve graphics performance, it will correspondingly increase console power consumption. Users need to go to 'System Settings → Console → Switch Software Running Mode' to manually enable this option. 不过，该功能目前仅支持上代 Switch 的软件，Switch 2 原生软件则暂不支持。任天堂同时提示，虽然此功能可改善画面表现，但会相应增加主机功耗。用户需前往「系统设置 → 主机 → Switch 软件的运行模式」手动开启该选项。

item.title: 英伟达 DLSS 5「AI 垃圾」引发玩家强烈反弹，黄仁勋：你们完全错了
item.guid: 英伟达-DLSS-5「AI-垃圾」引发玩家强烈反弹，黄仁勋：你们完全错了
item.description:
NVIDIA CEO Jensen Huang, during the Q&A session at the GTC 2026 conference, directly responded to players' criticism of DLSS 5 as 'AI garbage,' stating bluntly that 'their claims are completely wrong.' 英伟达 CEO 黄仁勋在 GTC 2026 大会的问答环节中，正面回应了玩家对 DLSS 5「AI 垃圾」的批评，直言「他们的说法完全错误」。

Regarding concerns about changing game art styles, Jensen Huang told a Tom's Hardware reporter that DLSS 5 integrates the controllability of game content such as geometry and textures with generative AI. He stated, 'It's not post-processing at the frame level, but generative control at the geometry level.' Developers can 'fine-tune the AI to suit their own style,' and artistic control will not be altered. 对于改变游戏艺术风格的质疑，黄仁勋在回应 Tom’s Hardware 记者时表示，DLSS 5 将几何体、纹理等游戏内容的可控性与生成式 AI 融合在一起，「不是在帧层面的后期处理，而是在几何层面的生成式控制」，开发者可以「对 AI 进行微调以适应自己的风格」，艺术上的掌控权不会因此改变。

He referred to this mechanism as 'content-control generative AI,' emphasizing that the input data comes from structured information provided by developers, such as 3D skeletons, motion vectors, and scene depth, rather than unsubstantiated 'speculative' generation. 他将这套机制称为「内容控制生成式 AI」（content-control），强调输入数据来自开发者提供的 3D 骨架、运动向量和场景深度等结构化信息，而非无依据的「猜测式」生成。

Unlike previous versions primarily used to improve resolution and frame rates, DLSS 5, leveraging neural rendering technology, can directly alter game visuals, adding detail to character hair, faces, game environments, and lighting. Jensen Huang called this the 'GPT moment' for graphics. 与以往主要用于提升分辨率和帧率不同，DLSS 5 借助神经渲染技术，能够直接改变游戏画面表现，为角色头发、面部、游戏环境和光照添加细节，黄仁勋将其称为图形领域的「GPT 时刻」。

However, the unveiling of this technology sparked an unexpectedly strong negative reaction. In a demo comparison for 'Resident Evil: Requiem,' enabling DLSS 5 resulted in character Grace's lips appearing fuller and her makeup heavier, presenting a distinctly different texture from the original. Similar 'AI beautification' effects were observed in characters and environments in 'Starfield'. 然而，这项技术的亮相却引发了意外强烈的负面反响。在《生化危机：安魂曲》的演示对比中，启用 DLSS 5 后角色格蕾丝的嘴唇更丰满、妆容更浓重，整体呈现出明显异于原版的质感；《星空》中的角色和环境也出现了类似的「AI 美化」效果。

Many players on social media and Reddit criticized this as 'AI garbage,' believing that the technology would homogenize game visuals and erase artists' original creative intentions. 大量玩家在社交媒体和 Reddit 上批评这是「AI 垃圾」，认为该技术会让游戏画面趋于同质化，抹杀艺术家的原创意图。

Bethesda (B社) subsequently issued a statement in response to a related article by tech media Digital Foundry, promising that what was currently shown was 'a very early version,' and that the art team would further adjust lighting and final effects. All DLSS 5 effects would be controlled by the art team and would be 'completely optional' for players. B 社（Bethesda）随后也在回复科技媒体 Digital Foundry 相关文章时发表声明，承诺目前展示的仅为「非常早期的版本」，美术团队将进一步调整光照与最终效果，所有 DLSS 5 效果均由美术团队把控，且对玩家而言「完全可选」。

item.title: 微软电脑管家上线「一键卸载龙虾」功能
item.guid: 微软电脑管家上线「一键卸载龙虾」功能
item.description:
According to Kuaikeji, Microsoft PC Manager announced yesterday the launch of a new 'One-Click Uninstall Lobster' feature, which currently supports OpenClaw and EasyClaw platforms, and will gradually cover more 'Lobster' platforms in the future. 据快科技报道，微软电脑管家昨日宣布上线「一键卸载龙虾」新功能，目前已支持 OpenClaw 与 EasyClaw 两款平台，后续将陆续覆盖更多「龙虾」平台。

For users who do not wish to completely uninstall for now, Microsoft PC Manager also provides a 'One-Click Stop' feature, which can automatically identify and stop local Lobster-related processes and services, while also confirming that relevant ports have been released and are no longer exposed externally. 对于暂时不想彻底卸载的用户，微软电脑管家还提供「一键停止」功能，可自动识别并停止本地龙虾相关进程与服务，同时确认相关端口已释放，不再对外暴露。

The official statement indicates that before using the above features, Microsoft PC Manager needs to be updated to version 3.20.7.0 or higher. The new features are currently being rolled out in grayscale. 官方表示，使用上述功能前，需将微软电脑管家更新至 3.20.7.0 及以上版本。目前新功能正在灰度上线中。

item.title: 360 回应「安全龙虾」安装包意外暴露 SSL 私钥
item.guid: 360-回应「安全龙虾」安装包意外暴露-SSL-私钥
item.description:
According to Jiemian News, 360 Company recently issued an official response regarding the private key leakage incident of its product '360 Security Lobster,' stating that it immediately revoked the involved SSL certificate, which is now completely invalid, and ordinary users are not affected. 据界面新闻报道，360 公司近日就旗下产品「360 安全龙虾」私钥泄露事件作出正式回应，表示已第一时间吊销涉事 SSL 证书，目前该证书已完全失效，普通用户不受影响。

360 explained that the leak stemmed from an operational error during the product release process, which led to the website certificate for an internal domain being accidentally bundled into the public installation package. The company has initiated an internal investigation process and will further optimize its security management mechanisms to prevent similar oversights from recurring. 360 方面解释，此次泄露源于产品发布环节的操作失误，导致内部域名的网站证书被意外打包至公开安装包中。公司已启动内部排查流程，并将进一步优化安全管理机制，防范类似疏漏再次发生。

Last week, 360 Group announced the launch of the '360 Security Lobster' intelligent agent application client and the '360 Security Lobster Box' hardware terminal, with the core function of lowering the local deployment threshold for AI intelligent agents. 上周，360 集团宣布推出「360 安全龙虾」智能体应用客户端及「360 安全龙虾 Box」硬件终端，核心功能是降低 AI 智能体的本地部署门槛。

On the same day, 360 held a special free 'Lobster' installation event at its headquarters campus, where founder Zhou Hongyi personally demonstrated the installation and deployment process for users. 同日，360 在总部园区特设免费装「龙虾」活动，创始人周鸿祎亲赴现场为用户演示安装部署流程。

However, two days later, security community researchers, while unzipping the product's installation package, discovered a plaintext-stored wildcard SSL certificate and its corresponding RSA private key in a specific path. 然而两天后，安全社区研究人员在解压该产品安装包时，发现其特定路径下存在明文存储的泛域名 SSL 证书及对应 RSA 私钥。

Once a private key is leaked, attackers could theoretically use it to forge HTTPS services for relevant domains, carry out man-in-the-middle attacks, and subsequently steal user data or spread malicious programs. 私钥一旦泄露，攻击者理论上可借此伪造相关域名的 HTTPS 服务，实施中间人攻击，进而窃取用户数据或传播恶意程序。

However, a report from Blue Point Network also pointed out that this certificate is only used for *.myclaw.360.cn, and this domain only listens to the 127.0.0.1 loopback address, not providing external access, thus posing no security risk. 不过，蓝点网的报道也指出，这份证书仅用于 *.myclaw.360.cn，这个域名仅监听 127.0.0.1 回环地址，不对外提供访问，因此没有安全风险。

item.title: 阿里钉钉发布企业级 Agent 平台「悟空」
item.guid: 阿里钉钉发布企业级-Agent-平台「悟空」
item.description:
Yesterday, Alibaba officially launched 'Wukong,' the world's first enterprise-grade AI-native work platform. 昨天，阿里巴巴正式发布全球首个企业级 AI 原生工作平台「悟空」。

According to reports, Wukong is a standalone application, launching its invitation-only testing today, and will also be directly integrated into DingTalk, fully supporting the connection of users' DingTalk accounts, secure access permissions, and application systems within enterprises. 据介绍，悟空是一款独立应用，即日起开启邀测，也会直接内置到钉钉之中，全面支持连接用户在企业中的钉钉账号、安全访问权限和应用系统。

    It features a built-in enterprise-grade operating environment, where AI Agents automatically inherit enterprise permission rules, all operations run in a secure sandbox, and token consumption and costs are visible in real-time. Wukong Agent can natively operate thousands of DingTalk capabilities, rather than simulating human clicks on a graphical interface, achieving "communication as execution";

    Wukong also launched an AI capability market, providing a full-link system from development, review, listing, to distribution, and fully compatible with the open-source Skill system, aiming to build "the world's largest toB Skill market."

    Wukong also released ten OPT (One Person Team) industry solutions, with the first batch covering ten scenarios: e-commerce, cross-border e-commerce, knowledge-based bloggers, development, retail stores, design, manufacturing, legal, financial and tax, and headhunting.

DingTalk CEO Chen Hang stated at the press conference: "Today, we have broken down DingTalk, rebuilt it with AI, and forged 'Wukong'. In the past, people used DingTalk to work; in the future, AI will use DingTalk to work." 钉钉 CEO 陈航在发布会上表示：「今天，我们把钉钉打碎，用 AI 重建，炼出『悟空』。过去是人用钉钉来工作，未来是 AI 用钉钉来工作。」

In terms of global expansion, Wukong will subsequently support connections to mainstream global IM platforms such as WeChat and Slack, allowing users to remotely invoke Wukong to complete work on computers and mobile phones. 在全球化布局上，悟空后续将支持连接微信、Slack 等全球主流 IM 平台，用户可在电脑和手机上远程唤起悟空完成工作。

🔗 Related reading: Just now, Alibaba ATH Business Group launched a trump card, "Wukong"! Enterprise-level regular army enters the field, the "lobsters" are really going to explode this time! 🔗 相关阅读： 刚刚，阿里ATH事业群甩出王炸「悟空」！企业级正规军下场，龙虾们这次真要炸了

item.title: 尼康召回部分 Z6 III、Z5 II 和 ZR：制造缺陷或致相机故障
item.guid: 尼康召回部分-Z6-III、Z5-II-和-ZR：制造缺陷或致相机故障
item.description:
According to PetaPixel, Nikon officially issued a Technical Service Advisory (TSA) yesterday, confirming manufacturing process issues with some Z6 III, Z5 II, and ZR cameras, which may lead to the cameras not functioning properly. 据 PetaPixel 报道，尼康昨天正式发布技术服务公告（TSA），确认部分 Z6 III、Z5 II 和 ZR 相机存在制造工艺问题，可能导致相机无法正常使用。

Nikon has identified the serial number range of affected products and promises to provide free repair services, regardless of whether they are under warranty, and will cover round-trip shipping costs. 尼康已确定受影响产品的序列号范围，并承诺无论是否在保修期内，均提供免费维修服务，同时承担往返运费。

According to Nikon USA's official announcement, this issue affects specific batches of Z6 III, Z5 II, and ZR models, and the company states that it has identified the affected serial number ranges. 根据尼康美国官方公告，此次问题涉及特定批次的 Z6 III、Z5 II 和 ZR 机型，官方表示已锁定受影响的序列号区间。

Users can check the serial number on the body label behind the camera's rear display and visit nikonusa.com/service-advisories/z-tsa-3-2026 to verify if their device is within the recall scope. Nikon has not yet disclosed the specific cause of the malfunction or the total number of affected devices. 用户可通过相机后背显示屏背面的机身标签查询序列号，并前往 nikonusa.com/service-advisories/z-tsa-3-2026 核查自己的设备是否在召回范围之内。尼康方面目前未披露具体故障原因，也未公布受影响设备的总数量。

It is worth noting that Z6 III and ZR cameras sold by Nikon Imaging (China) Co., Ltd. and authorized distribution channels in mainland China are not included in this recall, and users can use them with confidence. 值得注意的是，由尼康映像仪器销售（中国）有限公司及中国大陆授权经销渠道销售的 Z6 III 和 ZR 相机不在此次召回范围之内，用户可放心使用。

item.title: 💡 Netflix 联席 CEO：AI 不能只让影视「更便宜」，必须让内容「更好」才有意义
item.guid: 💡-Netflix-联席-CEO：AI-不能只让影视「更便宜」，必须让内容「更好」才有意义
item.description:
According to Business Insider, Netflix Co-CEO Ted Sarandos recently stated in an interview with POLITICO that the true value of AI to the film and television industry is not in reducing costs or accelerating production speed, but in whether it can genuinely improve content quality. 据《商业内幕》报道，Netflix 联席 CEO Ted Sarandos 近日在接受 POLITICO 采访时表示，AI 对影视行业的真正价值并不在于降低成本或加快生产速度，而在于能否切实提升内容质量。

Faster and cheaper, if what you make isn't better, then it's meaningless... This is the most competitive period in media history, and every move must be better than the last.

Sarandos positions AI as a "creator's tool," analogous to the long-term technological evolution of film and television production tools. He emphasized that the production of high-quality content still relies on human creators such as screenwriters, actors, and lighting technicians, and AI's role is to assist rather than replace. Sarandos 将 AI 定位为「创作者的工具」，类比于影视制作工具长期以来的技术演进。他强调，优质内容的产出依然离不开编剧、演员和灯光技师等人类创作者，AI 的角色是辅助而非取代。

In the field of voice acting, Sarandos explicitly stated that AI currently cannot replace human actors. 在配音领域，Sarandos 明确指出 AI 目前仍无法替代人类演员。

The most important part of voice acting is performance, and performance is a uniquely human ability. While AI voice acting is indeed much cheaper, it lacks the quality of performance and would instead lower the overall quality of the work.

However, he also saw practical application space for AI in this field—using AI technology to re-record lines months after filming is completed, without needing to recall all actors for re-recording, thereby enhancing post-production flexibility and final quality. 不过他同时看到了 AI 在该领域的务实应用空间——利用 AI 技术在拍摄结束数月后补录台词，无需召回全体演员重新录制，从而提升后期制作的灵活性与最终质量。

item.title: 45.99 万元起，岚图泰山 Ultra 下线交付
item.guid: 45.99-万元起，岚图泰山-Ultra-下线交付
item.description:
Yesterday, the Voyah Taishan Ultra, which completed L3-level road tests and extreme challenges, announced its off-line delivery, with an official price of 459,900 yuan; the Voyah Taishan Black Warrior was simultaneously launched, priced at 509,900 yuan. 昨天，完成 L3 级道路实测与极限挑战的岚图泰山 Ultra 宣布下线交付，官方售价 45.99 万元；岚图泰山黑武士同步上市，售价 50.99 万元。

    Both models are equipped with 34 perception sensors throughout the vehicle, including 4 LiDAR units and 5 4D millimeter-wave radars, forming a 360° all-weather perception network;

    Achieves full redundancy design in five key systems: steering, braking, power, communication, and perception, to meet the higher reliability requirements of L3 conditional autonomous driving;

    Adopts Huawei Qiankun Smart Driving ADS 4.1 solution, equipped with magic carpet chassis, bidirectional 16° rear-wheel steering, and three-chamber air suspension;

    All are equipped with the Lanhai intelligent super-hybrid system, featuring a 65 kWh large battery and 5C super-charging technology, complemented by a dedicated hybrid heat pump system, which officially claims stable operation in extreme cold environments down to -40℃.

Building on this, the Taishan Black Warrior emphasizes craftsmanship and aesthetic expression, adopting "hidden sharpness" as its design philosophy. It features aerospace-grade carbon fiber kits, PVD-crafted Heaven and Earth Starburst wheels (undergoing 10 processes), a hand-woven starlight headliner with 598 light beads, and smart dimming glass with 10 levels of fine adjustment. 泰山黑武士在此基础上着重强调工艺与美学表达，以「藏锋」为设计哲学，采用航空级碳纤维套件、PVD 工艺天地星芒轮毂（历经 10 道工序）、手工编织 598 颗灯珠星空顶，以及可实现 10 档精细调节的智能调光玻璃。

item.title: 最强「龙虾」模型上车：极氪 8X 首发搭载阶跃星辰 Step 3.5 Flash
item.guid: 最强「龙虾」模型上车：极氪-8X-首发搭载阶跃星辰-Step-3.5-Flash
item.description:
At yesterday's NVIDIA GTC 2026 conference, Geely Auto Group officially unveiled Super Eva—a super intelligent agent that integrates smart cockpits, intelligent assisted driving, and digital ecosystems. The Zeekr 8X will be the first to feature it, becoming the first mass-produced model in China to achieve a native AI experience similar to "Grok in Tesla." 在昨天的英伟达 GTC 2026 大会上，吉利汽车集团正式发布超级 Eva——一个打通智能座舱、智能辅助驾驶与数字生态的超级智能体，极氪 8X 将首发搭载，成为国内首款实现类「Grok 上车 Tesla」原生 AI 体验的量产车型。

Super Eva was jointly developed by Geely, Qianli Technology, and Jiejue Xingchen, with its core driven by Jiejue Xingchen's self-developed Step 3.5 Flash foundational model. Super Eva is natively integrated with underlying systems such as intelligent assisted driving, chassis, and power, capable of actively understanding vague instructions and autonomously planning and executing. 超级 Eva 由吉利、千里科技与阶跃星辰联合研发，其核心驱动来自阶跃星辰自研的 Step 3.5 Flash 基座模型。超级 Eva 与智能辅助驾驶、底盘、动力等底层系统原生融合，能够主动理解模糊指令并自主规划执行。

Users only need to say, "Take me to pick up the kids from school, and find a McDonald's for me on the way; I need to be at school before 5 PM." Super Eva can then accurately parse the intent, autonomously plan the route, and complete the entire chain of operations, including driving, passing McDonald's, and autonomous parking at the school entrance, without needing explicit step-by-step instructions. 用户只需说「带我去接孩子放学，顺便帮我找一家麦当劳，5 点前我要到学校」，超级 Eva 便可精准解析意图、自主规划路线，完成行车、途经麦当劳、到学校门口自主泊车等全链路操作，无需依赖明确的逐步指令。

item.title: 百度发布「龙虾」全家桶：手机、电脑、家居全覆盖
item.guid: 百度发布「龙虾」全家桶：手机、电脑、家居全覆盖
item.description:
Baidu officially launched its "Lobster" series of AI intelligent agent product family at the AI DAY event yesterday, covering multiple scenarios including desktop, mobile, cloud, and home. It includes four core forms: 百度昨日在 AI DAY 活动现场正式发布了旗下「龙虾」系列 AI 智能体产品全家桶，涵盖桌面端、移动端、云端及家居端多个场景。包括四款核心形态：

    DuMate for desktop focuses on full-link office automation, possesses enterprise-level security control capabilities, and can continuously learn user work habits;

    RedClaw for mobile (formerly "Red Finger Operator," officially renamed) focuses on zero deployment, zero configuration, supports cross-App interaction, and is designed for mobile use scenarios such as commuting and business trips;

    DuClaw for cloud offers one-click deployment capabilities via subscription, lowering the barrier to entry;

    Xiaodu Technology released the world's first "Home Lobster," bringing OpenClaw's complex task capabilities into the home space, supporting shared use by the whole family, and achieving full online-offline integration.

In terms of the Skills ecosystem, Baidu AI Cloud showcased three major skills: Search, Famou, and Miaoda. 在 Skills 生态方面，百度智能云展示了搜索、伐谋、秒哒三大技能。

    Search Skill provides real-time full-network retrieval services specifically for generative AI;

    Famou Skill is designed for scientific research and algorithm scenarios, supporting algorithm self-evolution, experiment management, and results visualization;

    Miaoda Skill (Miaoda App Builder) has been opened as an API, allowing users to create and publish web pages, mini-programs, and games using natural language.

Regarding security mechanisms, Feng Jinghui, Deputy General Manager of Baidu Security, introduced that the security system covers from the data layer to the system layer, and from cloud to mobile. Core principles include environment isolation, skill management, permission control, and memory management, ensuring that intelligent agents only access the minimum necessary data, and permissions are auditable and controllable. 安全机制方面，百度安全副总经理冯景辉介绍，安全体系覆盖数据层至系统层、云端至移动端，核心原则包括环境隔离、技能管控、权限控制与记忆管理，确保智能体仅访问最小必要数据，权限可审计、可控制。

item.title: 理想汽车发布下一代自动驾驶大模型 MindVLA-o1
item.guid: 理想汽车发布下一代自动驾驶大模型-MindVLA-o1
item.description:
Li Auto unveiled its next-generation autonomous driving foundational model, MindVLA-o1, at yesterday's NVIDIA GTC 2026 conference. 理想汽车昨日在英伟达 GTC 2026 大会上发布下一代自动驾驶基础模型 MindVLA-o1。

This model is centered around a native multimodal MoE Transformer, unifying vision, language, and action decisions into a single architecture, representing the largest architectural upgrade for Li Auto's assisted driving technology since its in-house development began in 2021. 该模型以原生多模态 MoE Transformer 为核心，将视觉、语言与行动决策统一至同一架构，是理想辅助驾驶技术自 2021 年自研以来最大规模的架构升级。

    More accurate perception: By introducing 3D ViT Encoder and LiDAR point cloud fusion, the model can simultaneously understand semantics and 3D spatial structures in a single representation, significantly enhancing its perception capabilities for complex road conditions;

    Deeper Judgment: The model possesses "multimodal thinking" capabilities, allowing it to simulate scene evolution several seconds in advance in the latent space. Driving decisions are no longer just reactions to the current scene but are based on predictions of the future;

    Smoother Driving: A unified behavior generation mechanism, combined with parallel decoding and discrete diffusion optimization, ensures greater spatial continuity and temporal stability in generated driving trajectories, leading to a smoother actual driving experience;

    Faster Iteration: The closed-loop reinforcement learning framework reduces training costs by approximately 75%, meaning Li Auto can more frequently push more capable assisted driving versions via OTA;

    More Efficient Deployment: Software and hardware co-design compresses architecture exploration time from months to days, significantly shortening the cycle for new models to be integrated into vehicles.

Li Auto stated that this framework will also be extended to physical systems such as robots in the future, with autonomous driving being just the starting point of its greater ambition. 理想汽车表示，该框架未来还将扩展至机器人等物理系统，自动驾驶只是其更大野心的起点。

item.title: 索尼发布首款 LOFIC 传感器 IMX908
item.guid: 索尼发布首款-LOFIC-传感器-IMX908
item.description:
Yesterday, Sony Semiconductor Solutions Corporation announced the new CMOS image sensor IMX908 for security camera applications. 昨天，索尼半导体解决方案公司发布了面向安防摄像头领域的全新 CMOS 图像传感器 IMX908。

    It adopts 1.45μm LOFIC (Lateral OverFlow Integration Capacitor) pixel technology, supports 4K resolution shooting, and can achieve a high dynamic range of 96dB in a single exposure.

    Equipped with Sony's proprietary "STARVIS 3™" LOFIC pixel technology, it boasts approximately 20 times higher saturation charge and about 27% improved low-light performance (SNR1s metric) compared to the previous generation 1/2.8-inch product IMX778, reaching 0.53 lx.

    The image size is 6.42mm diagonally (1/2.8 inch), with approximately 8.4 million effective pixels (3856 × 2180). It supports a maximum frame rate of 90fps (10bit), has a MIPI D-PHY 2/4 Lane output interface, and supports various HDR modes such as Clear HDR and DOL.

Sony stated that the introduction of IMX908 aims to meet the demand for sensors that can stably output high-quality images under complex lighting conditions, and plans to continue expanding its security sensor product line that balances high resolution and high dynamic range. Samples of IMX908 are expected to begin shipping at the end of March this year. 索尼表示，IMX908 的推出意在满足传感器在复杂光照条件下稳定输出高质量图像的要求，并计划持续扩大兼顾高分辨率与高动态范围的安防传感器产品线。IMX908 样品预计于今年 3 月末开始发货。

item.title: 1799 元起，浩瀚发布 MT3 系列 AI 稳定器
item.guid: 1799-元起，浩瀚发布-MT3-系列-AI-稳定器
item.description:
Yesterday, Hohem launched its flagship new MT3 series camera stabilizers, positioned as "professional creative AI stabilizers." Among them, the MT3 Pro is the world's first camera AI stabilizer that supports arbitrary target tracking. 昨天，浩瀚 Hohem 发布旗舰新品 MT3 系列相机稳定器，定位「专业创作 AI 稳定器」，其中 MT3 Pro 是全球首款支持任意目标追踪的相机 AI 稳定器。

MT3 Pro: MT3 Pro：

    Supports a payload of 2.5 kg. Official tests show perfect compatibility with mainstream full-frame standard zoom combinations such as Sony A7M5 + FE 24-105mm F4, Canon R5 II / R6 III + RF 24-70mm F2.8, Nikon Z7 II / Z8 + Z 24-70mm F2.8, and can simultaneously carry professional accessories like microphones and follow focus systems;

    The stabilization system has been upgraded to the tenth-generation iSteady, with motor torque increased by 40% compared to the previous generation;

    Built-in 2-megapixel AI camera and a million-level scene AI large model, extending tracking capabilities from traditional single portraits to arbitrary targets such as vehicles, pets, and static buildings;

    Equipped with a detachable monitoring controller and a 1.4-inch touch color screen, supporting wireless monitoring within 10 meters, and featuring the second-generation native quick switch between horizontal and vertical shooting;

    Supports 20 hours of long battery life, with 30 minutes of fast charging providing 5 hours of use.

In addition, Hohem simultaneously launched the standard MT3, positioned as a "lightweight creative AI stabilizer," integrating AI tracking composition, Teflon smooth leveling, quick horizontal/vertical shooting switching, and four-in-one compatibility in a 765-gram body. 此外，浩瀚同步推出标准版 MT3，定位「轻量创作 AI 稳定器」，以 765 克机身集成 AI 追踪构图、特氟龙顺滑调平、横竖拍快切及四合一兼容等功能。

Regarding pricing, the MT3 Pro is priced at 2399 RMB, with an initial launch price of 2299 RMB; the MT3 Pro Kit is priced at 2999 RMB, with an initial launch price of 2899 RMB; and the standard MT3 is priced at 1799 RMB. 定价方面，MT3 Pro 售价 2399 元，首发价 2299 元；套装版 MT3 Pro Kit 售价 2999 元，首发价 2899 元；标准版 MT3 售价 1799 元。

item.title: Beats x Nike 推出联名版 Powerbeats Pro 2
item.guid: Beats-x-Nike-推出联名版-Powerbeats-Pro-2
item.description:
Yesterday, Beats and Nike announced the launch of the Nike special edition Powerbeats Pro 2, marking the first time in Beats' history that it shares a logo position on product hardware with a collaborating brand. 昨天，Beats 与耐克宣布推出耐克特别版 Powerbeats Pro 2，这也是 Beats 历史上首次在产品硬件上与合作品牌共享 Logo 位置。

The new product features a fluorescent yellow and matte black color scheme. The right earbud is engraved with the Nike Swoosh logo, while the left earbud retains Beats' iconic 'b' logo, with both brands having a presence on the hardware. The charging case exterior has yellow accents, and the inside of the lid is printed with Nike's classic slogan 'JUST DO IT'. 新品采用荧光黄与哑光黑配色，右耳机刻有耐克 Swoosh 标志，左耳机保留 Beats 标志性的「b」字 Logo，两个品牌在硬件上各占一席。充电盒外壳带有黄色点缀，盒盖内侧印有耐克经典口号「JUST DO IT」。

In terms of performance specifications, the Nike special edition fully inherits all the configurations of the standard Powerbeats Pro 2: IPX4 sweat and water resistance, an ear-hook design that ensures a secure fit even during high-intensity workouts, and a built-in heart rate sensor. 在性能规格上，耐克特别版完整继承了标准版 Powerbeats Pro 2 的全部配置：IPX4 级防汗防水、高强度运动中也能稳固贴合的耳挂设计，以及内置心率传感器。

Currently, neither Beats nor Nike has announced the retail price or release date for this product. For reference, the standard Powerbeats Pro 2 retails for 2099 RMB in China, and the co-branded version may be slightly higher. 目前，Beats 与耐克均未公布该款产品的零售价及发售时间。作为参考，标准版 Powerbeats Pro 2 在国内售价为 2099 元，联名款价格或略高。

item.title: 星巴克推出「茉莉100」系列
item.guid: 星巴克推出「茉莉100」系列
item.description:
Yesterday, Starbucks officially announced the launch of its spring limited 'Jasmine 100' series of beverages, featuring 'a cup of natural floral dew infused with 100 jasmine blossoms'. 昨天，星巴克官宣春季限定「茉莉100」系列饮品正式上市，主打「一杯饱含100朵茉莉的天然花露」。

The three beverages launched this time are Jasmine 100 Latte, New Jasmine 100 Americano, and New Jasmine 100 Biluochun Tea Latte. Among them, the Biluochun Tea Latte uses finely ground Biluochun tea powder and is topped with jasmine-shaped chocolate decoration. 本次推出的三款饮品为茉莉100拿铁、New茉莉100美式以及New茉莉100碧螺春茶拿铁。其中，碧螺春茶拿铁使用了千目研磨的碧螺春茶粉，并在顶部搭配了茉莉花造型的巧克力装饰。

It is reported that the 'natural floral dew' in this series of beverages is extracted from double-petal jasmine from Hengzhou, Guangxi, China. The flavor compounds in each standard serving of the beverage's jasmine floral dew are derived from approximately 100 jasmine blossoms. 据悉，该系列饮品的「天然花露」萃取自中国广西横州的双瓣茉莉。每杯标准份饮品所含的茉莉花露，其风味物质约来自100朵茉莉花。

item.title: 周深献唱《挽救计划》中文主题曲
item.guid: 周深献唱《挽救计划》中文主题曲
item.description:
The sci-fi thriller 'Project Hail Mary' announced yesterday that singer Zhou Shen will perform the Chinese theme song for the film, which will officially launch today. The film is set to be released on March 20th. 科幻惊悚电影《挽救计划》昨日宣布，歌手周深将为该片献唱中文主题曲，歌曲将于今天正式上线，影片将于 3 月 20 日上映。

'Project Hail Mary' is adapted from the best-selling novel of the same name published in 2021 by sci-fi author Andy Weir, co-directed by Phil Lord and Christopher Miller, with the screenplay written by Drew Goddard, screenwriter of 'The Martian'. 《挽救计划》改编自科幻作家安迪·威尔（Andy Weir）于 2021 年出版的同名畅销小说，由菲尔·罗德（Phil Lord）与克里斯托弗·米勒（Christopher Miller）联合执导，《火星救援》编剧德鲁·戈达德（Drew Goddard）操刀剧本。

The story follows Ryland Grace, an ordinary middle school teacher, who is forcibly sent into space on a desperate rescue mission as the sun is being consumed by alien microorganisms called 'Astrophage' and Earth faces extinction. During his journey, he unexpectedly meets 'Rocky', an alien engineer from another galaxy who is also in distress. Together, they solve scientific puzzles and search for hope. 故事讲述一名普通中学教师瑞恩·格雷斯（Ryland Grace）在太阳遭外星微生物「光噬菌」侵蚀、地球面临灭顶之灾的背景下，被强制送入太空执行孤注一掷的拯救任务，并在旅途中意外结识来自另一星系、同样深陷困境的外星工程师「洛基」（Rocky），两者携手破解科学谜题、共同寻找希望的故事。

item.title: 《小黄人大眼萌 3》公布配音阵容
item.guid: 《小黄人大眼萌-3》公布配音阵容
item.description:
According to blogger 'Watch Hollywood', the voice cast for the 'Despicable Me' spin-off animated film 'Minions 3' has been officially announced, with several well-known Hollywood actors joining. 据博主「守望好莱坞」消息，《神偷奶爸》衍生动画电影《小黄人大眼萌 3》正式公布配音阵容，多位好莱坞知名演员加盟。

Confirmed voice actors include Allison Janney, Christoph Waltz, Jeff Bridges, Jesse Eisenberg, Zoey Deutch, and Trey Parker, with information on one additional actor not yet fully disclosed. 确认参演的配音演员包括艾莉森·珍妮、克里斯托弗·瓦尔兹、杰夫·布里吉斯、杰西·艾森伯格、佐伊·达奇及特雷·帕克，另有一位演员信息尚未完全披露。

The film is set in 1920s Hollywood, chronicling the Minions' adventurous pursuit of their acting dreams and their attempt to make a monster movie. The film is scheduled for official release in North America on July 1st this year. 本片故事背景设定于 1920 年代的好莱坞，讲述小黄人们追逐演艺梦想、试图拍摄一部怪兽电影的冒险经历。影片定于今年 7 月 1 日在北美正式上映。
